title: Fantastik
description: 512x Realistic textures, with POM and PBR
body:
# [DOWNLOAD FULL VERSION](https://www.patreon.com/posts/fantastik-512x-124106115)


Fantastik is a 512x realistic pack with support for POM and PBR.
My intention is to make Minecraft looks realistic, but still keeping the tradition color pallete. With PBR metal looks like metal and polished blocks looks polished, with POM, blocks dont look flat anymore and have depth.


I offer 2048x and 1024x versions for my patrons, as along with another packs:
## [Support Me](https://www.patreon.com/n87)
If you want, you can also join my Patreon for free
